message:
style(fp-index): cargo fmt collapse of single-assert_eq calls in index test module

Pure rustfmt churn in the fp-index test module — no behavior, ordering, or
assertion changes. Reflow four searchsorted assert_eq calls from the
multi-line per-arg layout down to the single-line idiom rustfmt produces for
short arguments, and collapse index_searchsorted_rejects_invalid_side's
assert!(…) to the one-line form.

The asof(100) assert near the top of the same module instead reflows from
one line to the three-line idiom because its arguments exceed the default
fn_call_width threshold once the outer assert_eq! and inner Some(...) are
included; that too is formatter-preferred, not a logic change.

Produced by `cargo fmt` over the workspace.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
